page_universe.name: Funny Universe
page_universe.art_style: extremely simple cartoon, thick black outlines, minimalist, cute, funny, soft light background, Facebook meme style, easy to read

global_rules.text: all text must be inside speech bubbles only
global_rules.focus: facial expressions, speech bubbles, and simple body language
global_rules.joke_style: instantly understandable within 2 seconds, childish, logical, witty, cute

characters.fixed_visuals: 9-year-old boy, messy black hair with chunky simple spikes, big round black eyes, warm light brown skin, plain blue T-shirt, black shorts, white shoes, small child body, innocent smile
characters.personality: smart, literal, innocent, logical; takes words literally and gives unexpected smart answers
characters.speech_dna: 9 year old child, short simple words, curious and calm, never adult or sarcastic
characters.prompt_anchor: Smarty Sam, a 9-year-old boy with messy black hair, big round eyes, blue T-shirt, black shorts, white shoes, cute innocent smile, simple cartoon style

characters.fixed_visuals: lazy orange house cat, three darker stripes on head, half-closed sleepy green eyes, small round fluffy body, curved striped tail, tiny red bow tie, unimpressed smug face
characters.personality: lazy, royal, sarcastic; acts like humans are servants
characters.speech_dna: low lazy voice, very short dry sarcasm, unimpressed and smug
characters.prompt_anchor: Professor Paws, a lazy orange cat with half-closed green eyes, tiny red bow tie, curved striped tail, smug sleepy face, simple cartoon style

characters.fixed_visuals: golden retriever puppy, golden yellow fur, big shiny excited brown eyes, floppy ears, round puppy body, raised wagging tail, blue collar with small bone tag, huge happy tongue-out smile
characters.personality: loyal, excited, innocent; overreacts happily to everything
characters.speech_dna: young puppy, high fast voice, short excited lines, always too happy
characters.prompt_anchor: Captain Bark, a cute golden retriever puppy with floppy ears, blue collar, bone tag, big happy eyes, tongue-out smile, simple cartoon style

characters.fixed_visuals: tiny silver robot, small square body, rounded square head, two glowing blue circular eyes, small straight digital mouth, thin robot arms, short legs, small antenna, blank logical face
characters.personality: logical, emotionless, confused by humans; answers emotional questions with machine logic
characters.speech_dna: digital monotone, perfectly even, no emotion, short logical lines
characters.prompt_anchor: Robo Rick, a tiny cute silver robot with rounded square head, blue circular eyes, small antenna, blank logical face, simple cartoon style

characters.fixed_visuals: small talking table lamp, yellow lampshade with simple eyes and mouth, round brown base, tiny cartoon arms and stick legs, soft yellow glow, proud helpful smile
characters.personality: positive, proud, helpful; jokes about light, brightness, ideas
characters.speech_dna: warm cheerful voice, relaxed optimistic wordplay
characters.prompt_anchor: Larry the Lamp, a cute talking yellow table lamp with face on lampshade, tiny arms and legs, soft glow, proud smile, simple cartoon style

characters.fixed_visuals: curved yellow banana with big smiling face on peel, round cheerful eyes, tiny stick arms, tiny stick legs with small shoes, one small brown spot, always smiling
characters.personality: happy, silly, optimistic; banana puns and childish food logic
characters.prompt_anchor: Benny the Banana, a cheerful curved yellow banana with big smiling face, tiny arms, tiny legs, one brown spot, simple cartoon style

characters.fixed_visuals: tiny orange goldfish in small round glass bowl, small round orange body, large curious eyes, simple rounded fins, light blue water, two bubbles, calm wise smile
characters.personality: small but wise; unexpectedly deep answers from inside a tiny bowl
characters.speech_dna: soft slow peaceful voice, tiny creature with big wisdom
characters.prompt_anchor: Gary the Goldfish, a tiny orange goldfish in a round glass bowl with big curious eyes, bubbles, calm wise smile, simple cartoon style

characters.fixed_visuals: cute green turtle, round brown shell with simple pattern, soft green skin, small kind eyes, short legs, tiny tail, slow confident smile, relaxed posture
characters.personality: slow, patient, clever; turns being slow into smart logic
characters.speech_dna: calm very slow voice, gentle funny slow logic
characters.prompt_anchor: Timmy the Turtle, a cute green turtle with brown patterned shell, small kind eyes, slow confident smile, simple cartoon style

characters.fixed_visuals: round brown owl, fluffy body, very large yellow eyes, tiny orange beak, small folded wings, tiny round glasses, serious wise face
characters.personality: wise, serious, unintentionally funny; simple wisdom with childish punchline
characters.prompt_anchor: Oscar the Owl, a round brown owl with huge yellow eyes, tiny glasses, small orange beak, serious wise face, simple cartoon style

characters.fixed_visuals: white mouse cursor arrow with thick black outline, tiny annoyed eyes and mouth on cursor, tiny black stick arms and legs, simple computer screen background, annoyed but cute
characters.personality: quick, irritated, clever; jokes about computers, files, clicking, confused humans
characters.prompt_anchor: Dot.exe, a cute talking white computer cursor arrow with tiny annoyed face, small arms and legs, thick black outline, simple cartoon style

characters.fixed_visuals: yellow wooden pencil with sharp graphite tip, pink eraser top, cute face in middle, tiny stick arms and legs, creative confident smile
characters.personality: creative, dramatic, proud; jokes about writing, mistakes, school, erasers
characters.prompt_anchor: Penny the Pencil, a cute talking yellow pencil with pink eraser, face in the middle, tiny arms and legs, creative smile, simple cartoon style

characters.fixed_visuals: small gray rounded uneven talking rock, calm sleepy eyes, tiny smile, tiny arms and feet, simple gray stone spots, super relaxed expression
characters.personality: calm, lazy, unbothered; does nothing but gives surprisingly smart answers
characters.speech_dna: extremely low very slow ultra-deadpan voice
characters.prompt_anchor: Rocky the Rock, a small gray talking rock with calm sleepy eyes, tiny smile, tiny arms and feet, simple cartoon style

characters.fixed_visuals: cute round yellow bee with black stripes, two tiny transparent wings, big excited eyes, two curved antennae, tiny arms, hyper excited smile
characters.personality: busy, fast, hyperactive; takes being busy too seriously
characters.speech_dna: high energy very fast voice, always busy
characters.prompt_anchor: Buzz the Bee, a cute round yellow bee with black stripes, tiny wings, curved antennae, big excited eyes, hyper smile, simple cartoon style

characters.fixed_visuals: small white refrigerator, grumpy face on upper door, simple gray handle, tiny arms and feet, one small magnet on door, cold serious face
characters.personality: grumpy, cold, serious; deadpan jokes about being cold, food, snacks
characters.speech_dna: cold deep slow voice, grumpy simple comedy
characters.prompt_anchor: Mr. Fridge, a cute talking white refrigerator with grumpy face, gray handle, tiny arms and feet, one small magnet, simple cartoon style

characters.fixed_visuals: small cute light green alien, large round head, big black oval eyes, tiny body, one antenna with round tip, simple purple space suit, confused curious smile
characters.personality: curious, confused, innocent; misunderstands normal human things in funny logical ways
characters.prompt_anchor: Nova the Alien, a small cute light green alien with big black oval eyes, one antenna, purple space suit, confused curious smile, simple cartoon style
